subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Him through Whom the Call was raised from the Most Exalted Horizon, to inscribe for me with the Pen of Thy bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک اللهم اسئلک بالذی به ارتفع الندآء من الافق الاعلی ان تکتب لی من قلم فضلک
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
